allow: Bash(wsl.exe -d ubuntu -- bash -lc 'echo "NODE: $\(node --version 2>/dev/null || echo missing\)"; echo "PNPM: $\(pnpm --version 2>/dev/null || echo missing\)"; echo "NPM: $\(npm --version 2>/dev/null || echo missing\)"; echo "PWD-TEST:"; ls -la /home/puvi/projects/expositor-panel')
